_comment: Canonical MEASURED results for OrbitSight (frozen evaluate.py). REAL-TIME deployable (single model per sensor + coasting, all <40ms CPU) = 0.719 after adopting the scale-free DIoU+hinge size loss on DAVIS+Stars3 (g256_hn_iou): DAVIS 0.753->0.783, Stars3 0.651->0.677 (full 4-seq re-score, /tmp/full_m15). Prior 100-epoch baseline 0.704. OFFLINE max 0.715 is now STALE (pre-DIoU) and would re-score higher.

real_time.config: per-sensor: EVK4->g192_ctx_v2, DAVIS+Stars3->g256_hn_iou (grid-256 hard-neg + DIoU+hinge size loss), Thuraya3->g192_ctx_v2 + coasting Kalman. All sensors <40ms CPU.
real_time.note: measured full-pipeline re-score (mean of 4 test-seq APs); meets criterion #3 (<40ms CPU)

offline.config: router: EVK4->cross-grid ensemble+TTA, DAVIS/DVX->temporal+TTA, Stars3->g256_hn, Thuraya3->v2 coasted
offline.note: max accuracy; cross-grid ensemble+TTA ~211ms -> NOT real-time

best_config: REAL-TIME deployed: 0.719 (DIoU size loss on DAVIS+Stars3). Prior 100-epoch baseline 0.704. OFFLINE 0.715 now stale (pre-DIoU).

overall.note: 4 test-seq aggregate (DIoU on DAVIS+Stars3); mAP = mean of per-seq APs (EVK4 0.881, DAVIS 0.783, Stars3 0.677, Thuraya3 0.534)

dvx_levers.note: grid-256 separates the star field; hard-neg mining suppresses background-star FPs; coasting Kalman recovers dim windows; 100-epoch convergence lifts EVK4 and Thuraya3.

diou_size_loss.note: Scale-free DIoU + hinge box loss on the CenterNet size head, replacing L1 on (w,h). L_box = base*(1-DIoU) + lambda*max(0, tau+margin-IoU)^2, tau=0.5, margin=0.15, lambda=2, base=0.5. Hinge concentrates gradient on the IoU>=0.5 near-miss cliff; DIoU keeps gradient non-vanishing for disjoint boxes. Enabled with --iou-size.

phase_a.config: g256_hn recipe (grid-256, hard-neg 2.0, 100ep/patience15) + --iou-size; A/B vs L1 g256_hn_v2, same-run scoring on DAVIS+Stars3
phase_a.verdict: clean win; both sensors up, recall up (Stars3 0.798->0.841, DAVIS 0.808->0.818), 220 near-misses cross IoU 0.5. Adopt g256_hn_iou.pt.

ablation._comment: margin/lambda sweep on the g256_hn DAVIS+Stars3 checkpoint (measured 2-seq mAP). Ablation is on the LOSS, run once here, not per-sensor. Margin unimodal peak at 0.15; pure DIoU (l0) is worst -> the hinge adds value on top of scale-invariance.

related_levers_rejected_davis_stars3._comment: stacked on the DIoU winner; both HURT DAVIS+Stars3 (crowded field / off-bulk focus). Retained as flags, re-tested on Thuraya3 (Batch 2, opposite regime).

phase_b_evk4.note: g192_ctx_v2 + --iou-size (g192_ctx_iou.pt); apply the winning ablation config

full_rescore_projected.note: 4-seq deployed pipeline with g256_hn_iou swapped in; projected ~0.72 overall (up from 0.704), pending measured re-score

latency_note: Deployed real-time config: single model per sensor (g192_ctx_v2 + g256_hn) + coasting, CPU streaming (batch=1) -> 15-38 ms/window, all sensors under 40ms. Offline variant (0.715, cross-grid+TTA) is ~211ms.
